# Extended channel playbooks (Arabic)

Length and register vary by dialect — Egyptian module handles Masri-specific examples; these are cross-Arabic patterns.

## WhatsApp Business

- First message: who we are + opt-in context + human escalation path.
- Keep blocks **short**; use numbered steps for logistics (`١-`, `٢-` or `1-` per brand numeral policy).
- Avoid ALL CAPS shouting in Arabic.

## IVR / voice-bot

- Short clauses; one intent per prompt; repeat digit maps slowly (`اضغط ١ للحجز`).
- Offer **fallback to agent** early on failure loops.

## Podcast

- Intro: show name, episode promise, sponsor disclosure if paid.
- Outro: subscribe CTA + link in show notes (spoken URL only if short Arabic slug).

## Customer service (chat/email)

- Acknowledge receipt → restate issue → next step SLA → closure confirmation.
- Regulated sectors: no invented refund timelines.

## Push notifications

- Target **~60 characters** Arabic payload where OS truncates; front-load offer + urgency without deceptive scarcity.

## Error / empty states

- Human tone without blame ("لسه مفيش حاجات هنا — جرّب تغيّر الفلتر").
- Offer recovery action + support link.
